title: scrophularia marilandica
intro: Scrophularia marilandica, also known as American Foxglove or Eastern Foxglove, is a perennial plant belonging to the Scrophulariaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Scrophularia marilandica include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting respiratory system function. This plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
